completed_tasks.name: Canonical runtime contract and regression baseline
Runtime verification runner hardening
completed_tasks.progress: Committed the baseline verification script and several runner enhancements (`3d1b487`, `e9adb2d`, `18b8c08`). Current local-only changes add stronger smoke/core/full semantics, commands-schema-check, and tree-find-click composite verification, but are not committed yet.

remaining_tasks.name: Doc boundary correction and project-owned trail refresh

blockers.description: No route-surface blocker is currently preventing accepted runtime use; remaining issues are process and hardening issues
blockers.workaround: Continue from the current contract/testing baseline instead of returning to route creation.

blockers.description: Repeated APK reinstalls on this ROM may require explicit accessibility rebind through secure settings during testing
blockers.workaround: Use the restore-runtime sequence from scripts/ghosthand-verify-runtime.sh.

blockers.description: Ghosthand-specific documentation was partly moved out of docs/ghosthanddev locally but not committed
blockers.workaround: Decide whether those local doc-boundary corrections should remain local-only or be committed later.

decisions.decision: Keep docs/ghosthanddev reference-only and keep Ghosthand progression in .planning and Ghosthand-owned docs
decisions.rationale: Project state and acceptance should not be mixed into the official/reference phone-control library.

decisions.decision: Use /commands as the canonical machine-readable runtime self-description endpoint for local agents
decisions.rationale: Runtime contract should be discoverable from the app itself and should not depend only on human docs.

decisions.decision: Prefer device-shell orchestration as the authoritative runtime verification method
decisions.rationale: Host-side timing produced false negatives for wait, foreground change, and other state-sensitive routes.

next_action: Resume by reviewing the current local-only hardening changes, then finish task 2 first: either commit or intentionally discard the latest verification-runner improvements (`commands-schema-check`, `tree-find-click`, smoke/core/full refinements). After that, decide how to handle the local doc-boundary corrections so Ghosthand-specific docs stay outside docs/ghosthanddev while the GSD trail remains authoritative.
context_notes: Phase 09 route creation is done and the verified route set is runtime accepted. The current work is strictly non-feature hardening. The strongest current baseline is already committed: Android implementation baseline, runtime acceptance record, machine-readable contract layer, payload/selector/wait/HTTP pure logic, JVM tests, and initial runtime verification script. What remains in the working tree is the next increment of verification-runner hardening plus local-only documentation boundary correction.
